# thoth_governance_pack_rules (Data Source)

Reads the active rule version payload for one compliance pack.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_governance_pack_rules" "hipaa" {
  pack_id = "hipaa-minimum-necessary"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pack_id` (String) Pack identifier.

### Read-Only

- `base_pack_version` (String) Base pack version associated with the active custom rule set.
- `current_version_json` (String) Active rule version payload as JSON.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable pack name.
- `regulation` (String) Regulation group for this pack.
- `response_json` (String) Full API response payload as JSON.
- `total_versions` (Number) Total rule versions retained for this pack.
